title: The Great Victory of Ngoc Hoi - Dong Da
summary: In 1789, during a lightning-fast march, King Quang Trung led the Tay Son army to crush 290,000 Qing troops, liberating Thang Long during the Lunar New Year (Tet).

slides.text: To defeat the enemy exactly during the Tet holiday, King Quang Trung led his army in a lightning-fast march from South to North.
slides.imagePrompt: Tây Sơn army marching rapidly through mountains and rivers, King Quang Trung on his horse leading, dynamic movement, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: King Quang Trung, wearing a dark-colored robe, rode a war elephant to command the fierce battle at Ngoc Hoi fortress.
slides.imagePrompt: King Quang Trung in a dark robe riding a war elephant, charging towards a fortress, battle flames, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Tay Son army used wet bamboo shields to close in and shatter the Qing army's firepower positions.
slides.imagePrompt: Vietnamese soldiers holding large wet bamboo shields, storming enemy lines, bravery, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: By the morning of the 5th day of Tet, our troops achieved complete victory and entered Thang Long amidst the joyous celebration of the people.
slides.imagePrompt: King Quang Trung entering Thang Long citadel, people holding flowers and flags, celebration of Tet victory, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which northern invader did King Quang Trung defeat?
During which holiday did the Ngoc Hoi - Dong Da victory take place?
